category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Antigua and Barbuda.

title.en: China-to-Antigua and Barbuda EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入安提瓜和巴布达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入安地卡及巴布達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Antigua and Barbuda ABBS / APUA requirements, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions, EMC evidence, hurricane and salt-mist environmental derating, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与安提瓜和巴布达ABBS / APUA要求、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件、EMC证据、飓风和盐雾环境降额，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與安地卡及巴布達ABBS / APUA要求、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件、EMC證據、颶風和鹽霧環境降額，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Antigua and Barbuda, the practical gaps are IEC-based safety and EMC evidence, connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 for the UK/IEC-legacy Caribbean environment, APUA grid and site acceptance for 230/400 V 50 Hz service, and environmental hardening for hurricane exposure, salt mist, heat, humidity, and sea-freight handling through St John's. Antigua and Barbuda's nominal 230/400 V grid differs from China's 220/380 V domestic baseline even though both use 50 Hz, so input-voltage range and thermal derating must be confirmed. The local EV market remains very small and a single Antigua and Barbuda whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the ABBS standard route, APUA project requirements, HS code, charger type, and any radio or smart-metering approvals before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入安提瓜和巴布达时，实务差距包括IEC体系安全及EMC证据、将接口从GB/T 20234改为适用于英制/IEC传统加勒比环境的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2、针对230/400 V 50 Hz供电的APUA并网和站点验收，以及面向飓风、盐雾、高温高湿和经圣约翰港海运装卸的环境加固。安提瓜和巴布达标称电网为230/400 V，虽与中国同为50 Hz，但不同于中国220/380 V国内基线，因此须确认输入电压范围和热降额。截至2026年6月14日，当地电动汽车市场仍很小，且未能从官方来源确认适用于EVSE整机的单一安提瓜和巴布达强制认证规则；出口商应在出货前核实ABBS标准路径、APUA项目要求、HS编码、充电桩类型及无线或智能计量审批。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入安地卡及巴布達時，實務差距包括IEC體系安全及EMC證據、將接口從GB/T 20234改為適用於英制/IEC傳統加勒比環境的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2、針對230/400 V 50 Hz供電的APUA併網和站點驗收，以及面向颶風、鹽霧、高溫高濕和經聖約翰港海運裝卸的環境加固。安地卡及巴布達標稱電網為230/400 V，雖與中國同為50 Hz，但不同於中國220/380 V國內基線，因此須確認輸入電壓範圍和熱降額。截至2026年6月14日，當地電動汽車市場仍很小，且未能從官方來源確認適用於EVSE整機的單一安地卡及巴布達強制認證規則；出口商應在出貨前核實ABBS標準路徑、APUA項目要求、HS編碼、充電樁類型及無線或智能計量審批。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABBS scope determination, APUA approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Antigua and Barbuda standards, APUA project requirements, IEC standard editions, customs rules, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABBS适用范围裁定、APUA批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行安提瓜和巴布达标准、APUA项目要求、IEC标准版本、海关规则及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABBS適用範圍裁定、APUA批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行安地卡及巴布達標準、APUA項目要求、IEC標準版本、海關規則及安裝要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
